Bus Timings

N55 Bus Schedule Al Ghubaiba to Al Maktoum International Airport (Overnight Service)

December 31, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai Bus N55 is an essential part of Dubai’s public transportation system, operating overnight to connect key locations across the city. This bus route provides a vital link between Ghubaiba Bus Station and Al Maktoum International Airport, catering to the needs of late-night travelers, shift workers, and early morning flyers. Its extensive route covers many popular destinations, hotels, and residential areas, ensuring convenient travel options during the late hours.

Route Name N55
Route Description Ghubaiba Bus Station · 6 - Al Maktoum International Airport, Arrivals
Total Distance Approximately 25 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 40 minutes
Operational Hours 21:42 to 04:40 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus N55

Bus N55 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

The Bus N55 operates on a specific schedule with departures from both Ghubaiba Bus Station and Al Maktoum International Airport. The timings are as follows:

From Ghubaiba Bus Station · 6 From Al Maktoum International Airport, Arrivals
21:55 21:42
22:35 22:21
23:10 23:00
23:44 23:30
00:18 00:00
00:54 00:30
01:26 01:00
01:58 01:35
02:28 02:15
02:58 02:50
03:28 03:50
03:56 04:40

Bus N55 Timetable

For a full overview of the N55 bus schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or click here: N55 Bus Timings.

Also See: Guide to Bus 308 Route and Stops: Sharjah to Jebel Ali

Bus Ticket Price

As of February 2024, the standard fare for the Bus N55 is AED 3. This fare structure is consistent with other public buses in Dubai, making it an economical choice for late-night travel. Passengers will need a Nol card to pay for their journey, which can be purchased and recharged at various locations across the city.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus N55 does not offer an online booking system. Passengers can board the bus directly at any of the designated stops along the route. For real-time updates and schedules, passengers can use the RTA Dubai app or visit the RTA website. The app provides live bus arrival times, route maps, and other useful information to help plan your journey effectively.

Other RTA Dubai bus routes to consider include the F11, which passes through the Financial Center Metro Seaside station, and the X25, which connects Karama Bus Station with Dubai Silicon Oasis.

Bus Route

The Bus N55 route is comprehensive, covering a wide range of stops between Ghubaiba Bus Station and Al Maktoum International Airport. The route includes the following key stops:

  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 6

  2. Department of Ports & Customs

  3. Al Mina Road

  4. Capital Hotel

  5. Hudheiba

  6. Jumeira Rotana Hotel

  7. Dhiyafa, Road, 2

  8. Satwa, Masjid

  9. Satwa, Clinic

  10. Bada

  11. Satwa Square

  12. Khadri Masjid

  13. Bilal Bin Ribah School

  14. Satwa Road

  15. Rehabilitation Center

  16. Emirates Bank

  17. Police Training School

  18. Jumeira, Post Office

  19. Rashid Al Hadees Masjid

  20. Rashid Bin Bakhait Masjid

  21. Majlis Al Ghoreifa

  22. Saeed Majid Bil Yoha Mosque

  23. Jumeira 3, Mosque

  24. Dubai Offshore Sailing Club

  25. Manara, Enoc

  26. Abu Manara Masjid

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Umm Suqeim

  2. Dubai Municipality Center

  3. Saeed Bin Huzeim Masjid

  4. Umm Suqeim, Library

  5. Umm Suqeim, Park

  6. Maharba Mosque

  7. Wild Wadi

  8. Burj Al Arab Hotel

  9. Madinat Jumeira

  10. King Salman Bin Abdulaziz Al Saud Street 1

  11. King Salman Bin Abdulaziz Al Saud Street, 2

  12. King Salman Bin Abdulaziz Al Saud Street, 3

  13. Dubai College

  14. Palm Jumeirah Monorail Station

  15. Royal Mirage Hotel

  16. Le Meridien Hotel

  17. Royal Meridian

  18. Jumeirah Beach Residence 1 Seaside

  19. Jumeirah Beach Residence 2 Seaside

  20. Ibn Battuta Bus Station · 3

  21. Ibn Battuta, Food Court

  22. Jebel Ali Gardens, Turnoff

  23. Al Maktoum International Airport, Departure

  24. Al Maktoum International Airport, Arrivals

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus N55 (overnight) route includes several notable tourist attractions and destinations in Dubai: 1.

  1. Wild Wadi: A popular water park located near the Burj Al Arab, offering a variety of water rides and attractions.

  2. Madinat Jumeira: A traditional Arabian resort complex with waterways, shopping, and dining options, providing a picturesque setting and a taste of old Dubai.

  3. Jumeirah Beach Residence (JBR): A bustling waterfront area with shops, restaurants, and beautiful beach views.

5.

  1. Dubai College: A well-regarded educational institution in the area, though not a tourist destination, it is part of the vibrant community along the route.

  2. Ibn Battuta Mall: A large shopping mall with themed sections inspired by different countries, offering a wide range of shopping and dining options.

  3. Dubai Offshore Sailing Club: Located near the Dubai Marina, this club offers sailing and maritime activities with views of the city’s skyline.

These stops ensure that the Bus N55 route provides access to some of Dubai’s most popular and visually striking destinations.

Read More: Bus 111 in Abu Dhabi: Route Map and Stops

Journey Experience

This late-night ride gives passengers a unique, quieter perspective of the city, passing by major landmarks such as Expo City Dubai, a symbol of the city’s global ambitions after hosting Expo 2020. Despite the extended travel time, the journey offers a serene experience, blending Dubai’s vibrant skyline with its expanding futuristic developments.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can travel to Al Maktoum International Airport, Arrivals, the furthest point on the N55 (overnight) bus route, starting from Ghubaiba Bus Station · 6. The price for this journey ranges from AED 184 to AED 224, offering a comfortable and convenient way to reach the airport while enjoying the extensive coverage of Dubai’s key areas provided by the N55 route.

Whether you’re traveling from central Dubai to the airport or exploring the city’s landmarks during the night, Bus N55 offers a reliable and affordable transportation option. Its extensive coverage ensures that you can reach major destinations and connect seamlessly with other parts of the city even during late hours. With frequent service and strategic stops, the N55 bus makes nighttime travel both convenient and accessible for all.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 31, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
